license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.7jrhkm6
title: Electrocompetent E. coli
author: Alba Balletbó

steps_raw.instruction: Grow 5 mL culture of LB w/o salts overnight
Inoculate 400 mL LB w/o salts with 5 ml pre-culture and incubate for 3 hours to OD600 0.5-1.0.
Transfer culture volume to 8 Greiner tubes of 50 mL and leave on ice for 15 minutes.
Remove supernatant and add 5 mL + 45 mL of 10% glycerol.
Remove supernatant and add 5mL + 45mL of 10% glycerol.
Remove supernatant and resuspend in 1 mL ice-cold 10% glycerol, pool fractions.
Remove supernatant and add 400 μL 10% glycerol (=800 μL suspension).
Aliquot 40μL in pre-cooled eppendorfs and flash freeze with N 2 (l). Store -80ºC.
